# Lyft Amex Offer: Spend $50 & Get $15 Back

By

[Tim Steinke](https://frequentmiler.com/author/timsteinke/)

\-

January 2, 2025

[13](https://frequentmiler.com/lyft-amex-offer-spend-50-get-15-back/#comments)

There’s a very good Amex Offer for Lyft showing on some folk’s account that can save you up to 30% when spending $50 or more.

This must be relatively tightly-targeted, however. I checked both mine and my wife’s accounts after Stephen noticed the offer this morning, we struck out and were 0-30.

## The Deal

- Spend $50 in one or more transactions with Lyft and get $15 back with a targeted Amex Offer.

## Key Terms

- Expires March 31st, 2025.
- Must use enrolled Card as payment method directly with Lyft mobile app.
- Excludes electronic gift card purchases and international rides.
- Offer valid only on purchases made in US dollars.
- Offer only valid on purchases made directly with the merchant.

## Quick Thoughts

If you’re targeted, this is a pretty good discount without much required spend on Lyft. I can’t remember the last time that we saw a Lyft Amex offer…hopefully this is a sign that there will be more on the way.

**Want to learn more about miles and points?** [Subscribe to email updates](https://frequentmiler.com/subscribe/) or check out [our podcast](https://frequentmiler.com/frequent-miler-on-the-air/) on your favorite podcast platform.
